title: selaginella arenicola
intro: Selaginella arenicola, also known as beach spike moss or coastal spikemoss, is a type of small, low-growing, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus, native to coastal areas and sandy beaches. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella arenicola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions.
